g.text: Read scaling with replicas (pgauthzd front door)
Please use CSS style instead of skinparam padding
pgauthzd (reader) — the front door; AuthZEN + native API; consults OPA (compat-opa) or answers direct (decision-only)
OPA — internal Rego policy sidecar; ONLY pgauthzd calls it
PostgreSQL primary — read-write (write path: see write-api)
